summary.shape_sentence: Early selloff into 09:45 LOD, strong 10:00 reclaim, then stair-step bullish trend into midday highs with mild late consolidation.

goat.note: Upside reversal from roughly 25,452 to 25,552 into the 10:00 window.

red_circles.behavior: No red-circle labels visible in the provided frame; bearish pivots were temporary pullbacks only.

green_circles.behavior: No green-circle labels visible in the provided frame; bullish behavior concentrated at the 09:45 reversal and 11:00 continuation.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: No orange bank/castle icons visible; implied supply near 25,590-25,600 was broken and accepted above.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: No blue bank/castle icons visible; implied demand near 25,452-25,460 and 25,550-25,560 was respected.

time_markers.10am_blue: Strong upside reversal/reclaim phase off the 09:45 low.
time_markers.12pm_red: Bullish high hold around 25,590-25,600 before another push higher.
time_markers.2pm_green: Not visible in the provided chart frame.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Not visible in the provided chart frame; close inferred near 25,613.

takeaway: Bullish reversal trend day: early RTH flush into demand, violent 10:00 reclaim, then higher-low continuation and high-end consolidation.
